title: eberlanzia persistens
side_effects: Eberlanzia persistens can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of Eberlanzia persistens may also cause respiratory problems, such as shortness of breath and coughing. Furthermore, it may interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse effects that can be severe in some individuals.
